---
title: "test_voice_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_voice_check.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.60
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.95
---

## Intent
The `test_voice_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_phrases, test_voice_check_usage, test_voice_check_execution. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_phrases, test_voice_check_usage, test_voice_check_execution. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.voice_check](file://src.tools.voice_check)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)

### Exports
- `mock_phrases`
- `test_voice_check_usage`
- `test_voice_check_execution`
